subject: A translucent, fiery red phantom or spirit erupting from a burning floor inside a ruined Victorian-style parlor, its elongated clawed limbs flailing as it telekinetically hurls furniture and debris through the air
description: A spectral humanoid figure rendered entirely in glowing red and orange tones rises from a hole of flame and shattered floorboards in the center of a derelict mansion room. The phantom is long-limbed and gaunt, with clawed hands stretched outward and upward in a violent gesture, its body semi-transparent and crackling with prismatic refractive light along its edges. Around it, household objects — a tufted fainting couch with curled wooden legs, a wooden chair, a lantern, and a smaller framed object — float and tumble mid-air as if caught in a poltergeist's tantrum. Tall arched windows with broken panes line the right side of the room, letting in a pale, smoke-tinged daylight that contrasts the hot internal fire below. Tiled floor and crumbled bricks lie scattered across the foreground, with flames licking up through the breach. The mood is destructive, kinetic, and supernatural — a haunting in mid-eruption.
foreground: burning phantom rising through shattered floor amid scattered bricks and flames
background: ruined Victorian parlor interior with tall arched windows, floating furniture, and smoke-pale daylight
emotion: raging, furious, eruptive — limbs splayed in violent supernatural agitation
